p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

title.value: Specimen Type Used In Viral Load testing

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

tr.td: Human immunodeficiency virus-1 nucleic acid assay

description.value: A code used to indicate the category for the lab result.

display.value: Human immunodeficiency virus-1 nucleic acid assay

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

tr.td: Inappropriate bottle or container for sample

title.value: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected

description.value: Reasons why a lab order was cancelled or rejected.

display.value: Inappropriate bottle or container for sample

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

tr.td: Consent given for communication by short message service text messaging

display.value: Consent given for communication by short message service text messaging

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

tr.td: Poisoning caused by drug AND/OR medicinal substance
Drug not available - out of stock
Drug interactions considered as new drugs added
Finding related to risk factor in pregnancy

description.value: Used by the careplan to indicate the reason why a patient had their ARV regimen changed.

display.value: Poisoning caused by drug AND/OR medicinal substance
Drug not available - out of stock
Drug interactions considered as new drugs added
Finding related to risk factor in pregnancy

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

description.value: Describes a patient's current viral load status.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

description.value: A list of possible HIV conditions.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

description.value: Used by the observation to indicate whether a patient is pregnant.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

description.value: Codes used to represent a medication request for ART.

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

tr.td: Product containing only abacavir and lamivudine
Product containing only atazanavir and ritonavir
Product containing only lopinavir and ritonavir
Product containing only lamivudine and zidovudine

display.value: Product containing only abacavir and lamivudine

Product containing only lopinavir and ritonavir

tr.td: HIV 2 proviral DNA [Presence] in Specimen by NAA with probe detection
HIV 1 RNA [#/volume] (viral load) in Specimen by NAA with probe detection

description.value: A list of HIV test types

display.value: HIV 2 proviral DNA [Presence] in Specimen by NAA with probe detection

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

title.value: Reason for Assessment or Test Not Performed

description.value: A list of reasons associated with the service request for the lab order.

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 31-Jan 2023

description.value: Used by the observation to indicate that a HIV test was performed.
